title: Resolution Commending and Recognizing Mr. Gabian Lexus O. Aguinaldo of Barangay Mayondon, Los Baños, Laguna for Winning Three (3) Bronze and Two (2) Gold Medals at the Different Swimming Events (BOY?S DIVISION, ELEMENTARY LEVEL) in the 2019 One Laguna Provincial Athletic Meet Held at Schools Division of Bi?an City on December 11-14, 2019.
